name: jarvis-pwa
description: Installable mobile PWA for Jarvis, served at /jarvis-mobile. Same stack as the Frappe HR PWA (Vue 3 + frappe-ui + Vite + vite-plugin-pwa/workbox + Tailwind). Distinct from the desktop SPA under frontend/ (served at /jarvis): this is the phone surface, a port of the jarvis_mobile React Native app.
